name: Pasta & Walnut Fruit Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Frozen orange juice concentrate, thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pasta according to package directions.
2. Chill the pasta in cold water and drain well.
3. Blend orange juice concentrate and yogurt together until smooth.
4. Toss the blended mixture with remaining ingredients (apples, celery, walnuts) and drained pasta.
5. Cover and chill thoroughly.
6. Serve on a bed of lettuce.
7. Garnish with fresh strawberries.
